title: Webwinkel Vakdagen
description: Webwinkel Vakdagen is the largest e-commerce event in the Netherlands. Thousands of online retailers, marketers, and tech professionals gather to discover the latest trends, tools, and strategies in e-commerce.

speakers.name: Sophie de Vries
speakers.title: CEO, NL Commerce Group
speakers.bio: Sophie has over 15 years of experience in Dutch e-commerce and has helped scale multiple online retail brands to 8-figure revenues.

speakers.name: Mark Janssen
speakers.title: Head of Growth, Bol.com
speakers.bio: Mark leads growth strategy at one of the Netherlands' largest e-commerce platforms, specializing in marketplace dynamics and seller ecosystems.

speakers.name: Lisa van den Berg
speakers.title: Founder, Checkout Experts
speakers.bio: Lisa is a conversion rate optimization specialist who has worked with over 200 Dutch webshops to improve checkout flows and reduce cart abandonment.

schedule.title: Opening keynote: The future of Dutch e-commerce
Keynote: Sustainable e-commerce — trend or must?

venue.name: Jaarbeurs Utrecht
venue.transport: 5 minutes walk from Utrecht Centraal train station. Parking available at Jaarbeurs P1 and P2.

title: Emerce Eday
description: Emerce Eday is the leading digital marketing and e-commerce conference in the Netherlands. Industry leaders share insights on digital transformation, customer experience, and the future of online retail.

speakers.name: Thomas Bakker
speakers.title: Chief Digital Officer, Coolblue
speakers.bio: Thomas oversees Coolblue's digital strategy across the Netherlands and Belgium, driving innovation in customer experience and logistics.

speakers.name: Emma Smit
speakers.title: Director of E-commerce, Rituals
speakers.bio: Emma leads e-commerce at Rituals, scaling their direct-to-consumer channel across 33 countries while maintaining brand consistency.

speakers.name: Pieter van Rijn
speakers.title: Partner, Deloitte Digital
speakers.bio: Pieter advises top-100 Dutch retailers on digital transformation, with a focus on omnichannel strategies and tech stack optimization.

schedule.title: Keynote: Building a customer-first e-commerce brand
Breakout sessions: SEO, Paid Media, Retention
Panel: The role of AI in the future of retail

venue.name: Ziggo Dome
venue.transport: Take metro line 53 to Strandvliet or bus 65. Parking available in the Ziggo Dome parking garage.

title: Shopping Today
description: Shopping Today is the annual congress and exhibition for e-commerce and omnichannel retail in the Netherlands. Organized by Thuiswinkel.org, it brings together retailers, suppliers, and innovators to explore the future of shopping.

speakers.name: Anna Visser
speakers.title: Director, Thuiswinkel.org
speakers.bio: Anna leads Thuiswinkel.org, the Dutch e-commerce industry association, advocating for fair and safe online shopping standards.

speakers.name: Joost de Groot
speakers.title: VP Commerce, PostNL
speakers.bio: Joost drives e-commerce logistics innovation at PostNL, working closely with thousands of Dutch webshops on last-mile delivery solutions.

speakers.name: Chantal Wouters
speakers.title: Head of Retail Innovation, ING
speakers.bio: Chantal focuses on fintech solutions for retail and e-commerce, including embedded finance, BNPL, and payment optimization.

schedule.title: Opening congress: State of Dutch e-commerce 2025
Keynote: Omnichannel — connecting online and offline
Panel: Sustainability in e-commerce supply chains

venue.name: Expo Haarlemmermeer
venue.transport: Bus 300 from Amsterdam Centraal or Schiphol. Free parking on-site.
